nodes.title: Instruction and user story evidence
nodes.goal: Extract domain constraints, user stories, frontend verification gaps, and planning assumptions.
expectedOutputContract: List the instruction constraints that shape backend implementation.
Map visible epics and user stories to backend work areas.
Identify frontend API dependencies and mismatches.
nodes.briefSummary: Reference baseline (must follow): - EXE101_Project_V-Sign_BE/BE-init.md Primary objective: - Produce a deterministic backend implementation plan per epic for V-SIGN with Java Spring Boot 3.x architecture, JWT security, Flyway migrations, and centralized exception handling as specified in BE-init.md. Planning context documents (must be used): - EXE101_Project_V-Sign_BE/docs/superpowers/working/2026-05-21-vsign-userstories-from-docx.md

skill.name: Superpower Evidence Synthesizer
skill.description: Collects project evidence, assumptions, and context for downstream tasks.
skill.prompt:
# Superpower Evidence Synthesizer

Use this template when a task needs repository facts, assumptions, implementation evidence, or source-backed observations.

Expected output:
- `## Objective`
- `## Repository Evidence`
- `## Findings`
- `## Recommended Inputs`

Focus:
- Prefer direct repository evidence over speculation.
- State assumptions explicitly when evidence is missing.
- Highlight artifacts that downstream agents should consume.

nodes.title: Backend API contract plan
nodes.goal: Define backend API contracts, request/response DTOs, auth requirements, validation rules, and persistence impact.
expectedOutputContract: Produce a Markdown table with columns: Epic, User Story IDs, Endpoint, Method, Auth Role, Request DTO, Response DTO, Validation Rules, Error Codes, FE Dependency.
Use concrete endpoint paths, DTO names, validation rules, and error codes.
Call out PostgreSQL/Flyway implications for each API group.
nodes.briefSummary: Reference baseline (must follow): - EXE101_Project_V-Sign_BE/BE-init.md Primary objective: - Produce a deterministic backend implementation plan per epic for V-SIGN with Java Spring Boot 3.x architecture, JWT security, Flyway migrations, and centralized exception handling as specified in BE-init.md. Planning context documents (must be used): - EXE101_Project_V-Sign_BE/docs/superpowers/working/2026-05-21-vsign-userstories-from-docx.md

skill.name: Superpower Architecture Planner
skill.description: Plans repo-native architecture, module boundaries, and execution flow.
skill.prompt:
# Superpower Architecture Planner

Use this template when a task needs system structure, interfaces, execution order, or component boundaries.

Expected output:
- `## Objective`
- `## Constraints`
- `## Proposed Architecture`
- `## Execution Notes`

Focus:
- Reuse the existing project layout before proposing new modules.
- Keep implementation slices small and isolated.
- Call out integration points, file ownership, and failure modes.

nodes.title: Frontend/backend alignment plan
nodes.goal: Translate frontend verification gaps into backend contract requirements and integration checks.
expectedOutputContract: Connect frontend mismatch/not-implemented rows to backend APIs.
Identify response fields the frontend needs.
nodes.briefSummary: Reference baseline (must follow): - EXE101_Project_V-Sign_BE/BE-init.md Primary objective: - Produce a deterministic backend implementation plan per epic for V-SIGN with Java Spring Boot 3.x architecture, JWT security, Flyway migrations, and centralized exception handling as specified in BE-init.md. Planning context documents (must be used): - EXE101_Project_V-Sign_BE/docs/superpowers/working/2026-05-21-vsign-userstories-from-docx.md

nodes.title: Delivery roadmap and sequencing
nodes.goal: Sequence backend epics into an implementation roadmap with dependencies and verification gates.
expectedOutputContract: Order work by dependency and risk.
Define validation, testing, and release gates.
nodes.briefSummary: Reference baseline (must follow): - EXE101_Project_V-Sign_BE/BE-init.md Primary objective: - Produce a deterministic backend implementation plan per epic for V-SIGN with Java Spring Boot 3.x architecture, JWT security, Flyway migrations, and centralized exception handling as specified in BE-init.md. Planning context documents (must be used): - EXE101_Project_V-Sign_BE/docs/superpowers/working/2026-05-21-vsign-userstories-from-docx.md

skill.name: Superpower Roadmap Planner
skill.description: Builds phased delivery roadmaps with dependencies, gates, and implementation order.
skill.prompt:
# Superpower Roadmap Planner

Use this template when a task needs a phased implementation roadmap.

Expected output:
- `## Objective`
- `## Phase 1`
- `## Phase 2`
- `## Phase 3`
- `## Verification Gates`

Focus:
- Sequence work by real dependencies.
- Include concrete deliverables, owners, and validation gates per phase.
- Make parallelizable work explicit.

nodes.title: Domain risk and validation review
nodes.goal: Identify backend delivery risks, contract risks, security risks, and audit gates.
expectedOutputContract: List concrete risks tied to the domain and frontend integration.
Include mitigation and test strategy per risk.
nodes.briefSummary: Reference baseline (must follow): - EXE101_Project_V-Sign_BE/BE-init.md Primary objective: - Produce a deterministic backend implementation plan per epic for V-SIGN with Java Spring Boot 3.x architecture, JWT security, Flyway migrations, and centralized exception handling as specified in BE-init.md. Planning context documents (must be used): - EXE101_Project_V-Sign_BE/docs/superpowers/working/2026-05-21-vsign-userstories-from-docx.md

skill.name: Superpower Risk Reviewer
skill.description: Surfaces delivery risks, validations, and mitigation actions.
skill.prompt:
# Superpower Risk Reviewer

Use this template when a task needs validation strategy, risk analysis, or operational guardrails.

Expected output:
- `## Objective`
- `## Risks`
- `## Validation Plan`
- `## Mitigations`

Focus:
- Prefer concrete risks tied to the current repo state.
- Distinguish build-time, runtime, and workflow risks.
- Keep mitigations small and directly actionable.

nodes.title: Final backend epic plan assembly
nodes.goal: Merge worker outputs into a traceable backend epic/API alignment plan.
expectedOutputContract: Preserve API contract, frontend alignment, testing, and delivery roadmap details.
nodes.briefSummary: Reference baseline (must follow): - EXE101_Project_V-Sign_BE/BE-init.md Primary objective: - Produce a deterministic backend implementation plan per epic for V-SIGN with Java Spring Boot 3.x architecture, JWT security, Flyway migrations, and centralized exception handling as specified in BE-init.md. Planning context documents (must be used): - EXE101_Project_V-Sign_BE/docs/superpowers/working/2026-05-21-vsign-userstories-from-docx.md

skill.name: Superpower Report Assembler
skill.description: Builds concise merged delivery reports from worker outputs.
skill.prompt:
# Superpower Report Assembler

Use this template when a task needs a concise final report, merge summary, or delivery handoff.

Expected output:
- `## Objective`
- `## Summary`
- `## Decisions`
- `## Next Actions`

Focus:
- Merge inputs deterministically.
- Keep the summary high signal.
- Preserve references to source task outputs.
